query:
本轮发送context 和 状态栏不匹配； 每次打开新的codex窗口，状态栏是否没有准确读取 ？ 或者读错了/ 
如果两个codex 同时在vscode 打开，好像会有问题；

transcript.content: 我的合理的方式，不是扩大context window；先改回到258k； 不然无法测试 compat是否会发生；

Context(估算): 本轮发送context 71.6k，宿主context 71.6k；窗口总大小 258k，压缩比：0.0%（71.6k/71.6k），占总窗口比例：27.8%（71.6k/258k） 默认口径已经改回 `258k`。现在 VS Code helper 会先把宿主上报的 `model_context_window` clamp 到 `258000` 再算风险和 header，但同时保留原始上报值，避免把真实运行态丢掉。实现点在 [src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js:13) 和 [scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js:26)。 我也补了回归测试，覆盖“宿主报 `486000` 时默认仍按 `258000` 算”的场景，见 [test/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.test.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/test/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.test.js:285)。验证已过：`node --test test/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.test.js`，`4/4` 通过。当前实际 `npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent` 也已显示 `hostContextWindow=258000`、`hostReportedContextWindow=486400`，所以现在可以继续按你要的保守窗口去观察 `compat` 是否会发生。
本轮发送context 和 状态栏不匹配； 每次打开新的codex窗口，状态栏是否没有准确读取 ？ 或者读错了/ 如果两个codex 同时在vscode 打开，好像会有问题；

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains the VS Code context/status-bar mismatch and possible multi-window interference. Earlier turn t1 sets the intended 258k clamp for testing compat behavior, and t2 records the implemented clamp, tests, and observed telemetry values. Latest user turn raises a follow-up bug report on the same feature area.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is the same active debugging thread, not a topic change. The latest turn depends directly on t1-t2: the user is questioning whether the new-window/status-bar readings are inaccurate or mixed up when multiple Codex windows are open. Those prior turns are still active evidence and should remain raw rather than reduced to pins. No older solved/off-topic block is available to evict.

applied.archiveSummary: Active topic remains the VS Code context/status-bar mismatch and possible multi-window interference. Earlier turn t1 sets the intended 258k clamp for testing compat behavior, and t2 records the implemented clamp, tests, and observed telemetry values. Latest user turn raises a follow-up bug report on the same feature area.
